query: SELECT DATE(createdAt) as day, count(distinct sessionKey) as cnt FROM page_views WHERE createdAt >= '2026-03-13 00:00:00' AND (timeOnPage IS NULL OR timeOnPage >= 8) GROUP BY DATE(createdAt) LIMIT 5;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway04.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user QXWpcJKwPBoGqNG.f679bd03aa5d --database CAeRhAUjAZoEuxNGm5QbPr --execute SELECT DATE(createdAt) as day, count(distinct sessionKey) as cnt FROM page_views WHERE createdAt >= '2026-03-13 00:00:00' AND (timeOnPage IS NULL OR timeOnPage >= 8) GROUP BY DATE(createdAt) LIMIT 5;
